title: DA1 5PP, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/MP3838UP/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited   Installation name: Long Reach Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/MP3838UP/V006   "
